name: Magic Trap
detailed_description:
Protect the obelisk! This is the source of your power. Place soldiers on the battlefield who will protect the obelisk. Place walls that will delay the enemy. Set the explosives. There are different types of enemies. Some attack near, some from afar, some leave two copies of themselves after death. Your decisions can affect the outcome of the battle!

  • Beautiful graphics
  • Interesting gameplay
  • Crowds of enemies
